data.body:
- successes + failures is > total claims, so obviously the counters are broken.  it is possible for success + failures to be less than total claims, because there may be claims in flight.  however we can fix that too by only using "completed claims" rather than "total"
- the graphs are stupid - we don't want to sum aggregations, we want to see success rates.  of course that is based on the idea that we fix the data to be accurate.
data.title: Audit Page loaded with mistakes
